message:
feat: add host path and launch command to packnplay list

Enhances the list command to show host directory path and original command line:

- Add host path column to standard list output
- Add verbose mode (-v/--verbose) with block-based display format
- Store host path and launch command in container labels
- Use future-proof design capturing complete os.Args automatically
- Maintain backward compatibility with existing containers
- Add comprehensive test coverage for new functionality

The verbose mode uses a clean block format that's much more readable
than mixing tabular and text content, especially for long command lines.

Standard output:
  CONTAINER    STATUS    PROJECT    WORKTREE    HOST PATH
  mycontainer  running   myproj     main        /path/to/project

Verbose output (-v):
  Container: mycontainer
    Status: running
    Project: myproj
    Worktree: main
    Host Path: /path/to/project
    Commandline: packnplay run --git-creds --publish 8080:80 claude code

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
